name: llm-wiki-plugin
description: A compounding, file-based knowledge wiki for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain a compounding Markdown knowledge wiki
interface.longDescription: Ingest, query, audit, reflect on, and maintain a file-based knowledge wiki with deterministic health checks.
defaultPrompt: Set up a compounding knowledge wiki.
Ingest this source into my knowledge wiki.
Query my wiki and cite the pages you use.
